messages.text: Your body swells into the shape of a great bear, hide thickening, claws lengthening.
{name}'s body swells and reshapes into the form of a great bear.
The bear's shape sloughs away and you settle back into your own body.
The great bear's shape melts away and {name} returns to their own form.
{name} is wearing the shape of a great, shaggy bear.
